markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GTM and delivery performance, identify bottlenecks, and define corrective actions.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Critical Sales Funnel Leak:** Qualified leads are being lost because they are not being created as opportunities in HubSpot, making them invisible to the sales team.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [**Content Quality is the Primary Bottleneck:** Subpar content is the main reason clients delay publishing, which directly impacts renewal rates and overall ARR health.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2076.0)
  - [**Check That is an Untapped Lead-Gen Engine:** The new product is not on the main website, missing a key opportunity to capture warm traffic and convert it into qualified leads for services.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**Q2 Renewals at High Risk:** 50% of Q2 renewals are flagged as red, with several accounts (Prophecy, Ambit, Udemy) likely to churn due to client-side issues.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2918.0)

## Topics

### Sales Funnel & Lead Management

  - [**Problem:** Qualified leads are not being created as opportunities in HubSpot, making them invisible to the sales team and causing a drop in new deal creation.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
      - [**Example:** A warm lead from Whisperflow (a company known to Marcel) was lost after a single, un-followed-up email.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [**Short-Term Fix:** Marcel's EA (Dig) will manually review Marcel's and Tyler's inboxes from the last month to create missing opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Long-Term Fix:** Jeff (RevOps) will implement a formal process to ensure all leads are captured in HubSpot from the first touchpoint.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)

### Check That & GTM Strategy

  - [**Untapped Lead-Gen Channel:** Check That, a new free product, is not linked on the main GrowthX website.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Result:** Missed opportunity to convert warm website traffic into qualified leads for GrowthX services.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Performance:** \~300 signups in 2.5 weeks (\~10/day), but 0 self-serve conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**New GTM Strategy:** Target the agency market directly, positioning GrowthX as a superior alternative to traditional SEO/content agencies.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is a battle GrowthX can win, as demonstrated by a recent audit for Eon (a Sequoia-backed company) that impressed them more than their current agency.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
  - [**Marcel's Social Media:** Marcel will increase public activity to build market trust and showcase vision, balancing this with the need to protect foundational IP.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)

### Content Quality & Delivery Bottlenecks

  - [**Problem:** Content quality is the primary bottleneck for client publishing, directly impacting renewal rates.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2076.0)
      - [**Root Cause:** A disconnect between the content produced and the client's audience/CEO perspective.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1968.0)
  - [**Solution:** Hire more fully ramped Engagement Managers (EMs) and Editor Leads (ELs) to ensure the highest quality standards.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2238.0)
      - [**New Roles:** Sydney (Sprint team) and Jen (Pods team) are now ELs, dedicated to raising the quality bar across all accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2703.0)
  - [**Marcel's Content Philosophy:** Prioritize "effective" over "efficient."](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3412.0)
      - [**Goal:** Every piece of content must be signal-heavy, delivering high information gain and actionable insights for the reader.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2603.0)

### Renewals & Account Health

  - [**Q1 Renewals:** On track at 74% of target.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2742.0)
      - [**Key Accounts:** Airbyte, Tamario, and Abnormal contracts are out for signature.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2793.0)
  - [**Q2 Renewals:** 50% of accounts are flagged as red.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2918.0)
      - [**High Churn Risk:**](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2918.0)
          - [**Prophecy:** CEO fired the marketing team; renewal is unlikely.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3024.0)
          - [**Ambit:** Client feels the content is "too technical" despite multiple AI engineering efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2941.0)
          - [**Udemy:** Acquired by Corsair; the CMO is leaving but will introduce GrowthX to JFrog.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3070.0)
      - [**At-Risk Accounts:**](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3106.0)
          - [**Alex:** Mismatch between GTM strategy (Fortune 50) and ACV ($30k).](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3120.0)
          - [**Logic:** Major pipeline issues; content editing takes 2-3 hours per piece.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3191.0)
  - [**Key Insight:** 6-month contracts create significant renewal risk, as any quality hiccup can jeopardize the relationship within a short timeframe.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3244.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
      - [Task Dig (Marcel's EA) with creating HubSpot opportunities for all warm leads from the last month in Marcel's and Tyler's inboxes.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Create a marketing plan doc detailing MQL sources, volume, and conversion tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [**Bridget:**](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3650.0)
      - [Follow up with Jeff (RevOps) to implement a formal process for capturing all leads in HubSpot.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
      - [Draft an email to the Viscom CEO to save the account, leveraging their Series B investor (Radical Ventures) if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3650.0)
  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2683.0)
      - [Schedule a bi-weekly content calibration meeting with Sydney (Sprint EL), Jen (Pods EL), and Marcel to review quality standards and examples.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2683.0)
  - [**Marcel:**](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
      - [Conduct a working session with Jason on Friday to set up end-to-end social media processes.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [**Leah:**](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3528.0)
      - [Update the renewal tracking sheet to categorize publishing blockers by cause (e.g., quality vs. client process).](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3528.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3384.0)
      - [Add Panzer to future GTM & Delivery Review meetings to discuss content quality and publishing bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/tNBUAHXttycdhzcszwLaLRJhXJE2VvTQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3384.0)
